header.title: Codeverta
header.subtitle: Professional software, website, and IT service ordering

step1.title: 1. Contact Us
step1.description: Contact our team via WhatsApp or email to tell us about your project goals, timeline, and business needs.
step1.contactNote: We will help clarify the scope, recommended solution, and next steps.

step2.title: 2. Consultation and Scope
step2.description: We review your requirements and prepare a suitable technical approach.
step2.pickupDescription: Discuss remotely with our team from anywhere.
step2.deliveryDescription: Available by appointment for selected projects and locations.
step2.note: *Larger projects may require a written scope of work before estimation.

step3.title: 3. Proposal and Down Payment
step3.description: After the scope is agreed, we send a proposal and invoice. A down payment is required before production begins.

step4.title: 4. Development and Review
step4.description: Our team builds the solution in milestones, shares progress updates, and collects feedback before final delivery.

step5.title: 5. Launch and Support
step5.description: After final payment, we help launch the project and provide support according to the agreed warranty or maintenance plan.

cta.title: Ready to start?
cta.subtitle: Talk with Codeverta and get a clear plan for your digital product.
